title: MCSR-406 Don't make fun of your mom! I was squid until I got sick of my son with bare libido ... 8 immoral mothers 4 hours - Shinoda Yu
description: My son started to look at my body unpleasantly. At first, I thought it was "because of my mind" and "just making fun of me", but one day I was finally forced to do so. No way it would be such an unpleasant thing ... This is the story of mothers who were attacked by their sons and turned into women.
